fields.Identifying_Data_Chief_Complaint: 26-year-old Asian American male with schizophrenia for routine visit.
fields.Subjective: Patient arrived appearing well-groomed and engaged. Reports perfect adherence to risperidone 4 mg nightly using bedtime routine, never misses doses. States feeling really well. No hallucinations for five months. No paranoid thoughts. Sleep excellent at 8 hours nightly. Appetite good, weight stable at 156 lbs. Working full-time as IT support specialist, thriving in career. Mood 'excellent' rated 8/10. Lives with parents which provides support and cultural connection. Recently got engaged to girlfriend of three years. Enjoys gaming and coding personal projects. Attends young professional networking group. One year sober from marijuana. Building confidence and independence. Planning to move into own apartment with fiancée after wedding. No safety concerns, denies SI/HI. (Evaluated by Dr. Linda Tran, MD, Psychiatrist)

Mental_Status_Examination.Appearance: Professionally dressed, excellent grooming, positive demeanor

fields.Psychosocial_Context: Lives with parents; employed full-time in IT; recently engaged; one year sober; planning marriage and independence.
Assessment_and_Plan: Outstanding medication adherence and symptom control.
Congratulated on engagement and career success.
fields.Author: Note written by Dr. Linda Tran, MD, Psychiatrist — Tech Workers Mental Health, 4521 Silicon Valley, San Jose, CA 95110, Phone: (555) 667-8821, Fax: (555) 667-8822
